caption: The video shows a man driving a vehicle, likely a truck or van, through a rural area with sparse vegetation and trees visible outside the windows. The driver is focused on the road ahead, holding the steering wheel with both hands. The interior of the vehicle includes a dashboard with various controls and a mounted device, possibly for navigation or communication. The scene suggests a journey from the Jordanian border to a hospital in Ramtha, as indicated by the subtitle text at the bottom of the screen. The environment outside appears dry and somewhat arid, typical of a desert or semi-desert region. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of purpose and movement, emphasizing the importance of reaching the destination.
